title: Building Resilient Microservices with Go and gRPC
summary: A practical guide to designing fault-tolerant microservices using Go, gRPC, and circuit breaker patterns — lessons learned from production.

title: PostgreSQL Query Optimization: From 10s to 50ms
summary: How I tracked down and fixed a slow query that was blocking our main checkout flow — covering EXPLAIN ANALYZE, index strategies, and partial indexes.

title: Terraform State Management in a Team Environment
summary: Best practices for managing Terraform state in teams: remote backends, state locking, workspace strategies, and how to avoid the state corruption trap.

title: Kafka Consumer Patterns You Should Know
summary: A deep dive into consumer group strategies, offset management, and handling rebalances gracefully — patterns that have saved us from data loss more than once.
